creator: dotzsoh-singapore
caption:
I can’t believe this place is real ✨🍂🍁🌅🌈✨ this is China #jiuzhaigou national park #sichuan 

📍#jiuzhaigou #九寨沟 was closed after a 7.0-magnitude earthquake on August 8, 2017, which caused significant damage to the area & reopened in late 2021 after restoration work including planting over 270,000 trees, repairing & restoring 172 hectares of ecological habitat, & improving infrastructure & I can’t even finish this national park in a full day 

🎞️ @dotzsoh @dotzsoh2 
#dotzsoh #chinatravel #ninevillagesvalley #四川 #中国 #autumninchina

transcription.text: I am love, little rainbow, little rainbow, I am love, little rainbow, little rainbow
